LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS ALAMO RENTAL (US) INC., ALAMO FINANCING, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NO EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT THE DRIVER WAS A PERMISSIVE USER OR THAT DEFENDANT OWED ANY DUTY TO PLAINTIFF TO PREVENT AN UNAUTHORIZED USER FROM INJURING HER IN THE MANNER ALLEGED. OBJECTION TO EXHIBIT 13 WAS SUSTAINED BY COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
